name: Sian Halat
title: Sian Halat

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Royal Swordsmanship: Chain Attack
basic.description: Sian swings his broadsword quickly to attack enemies.

core.name: Royal Swordsmanship: Judgment
core.description: Sian spins to slash enemies, then leaps and slams his broadsword downward towards the front.

skill.name: Royal Swordsmanship: Black Flash
skill.description: Sian attacks by unleashing a razor-sharp strike of concentrated mana from his sword.

skill.name: Royal Swordsmanship: Rush
skill.description: Sian swiftly slashes across a wide area and delivers a powerful strike, destroying the enemy's formation.

support.name: Royal Swordsmanship: Scarlet Moon
support.description: Sian unleashes sword energy shaped like a giant crescent moon to attack enemies.

qte.name: Royal Swordsmanship: Judgment Strike
qte.description: Sian rushes into the battlefield and strikes at the enemy's weak point.

ultimate.name: Knight's Pride
ultimate.description: Sian channels his inner strength into his broadsword and performs a powerful strike towards the front, leading the battlefield to victory.

passive.name: Flawless Swordsmanship
passive.description: Each time Royal Swordsmanship: Judgment, Black Flash, or Rush hit, they charge the [Flawless Swordsmanship] Gauge. When the gauge reaches 50% or more, it activates [Crimson Sword Dance]. When Black Flash or Rush hit, they activate the [Crimson Fury] effect.

advancements: When [Flawless Swordsmanship] Gauge reaches 50%+, Black Flash and Rush become Royal Swordsmanship: Full Moon and Bloodstorm, increasing their damage by 100%. Using Full Moon or Bloodstorm removes 50% of the Gauge. When those skills hit, they inflict [Scarlet Domination] on the target. [Crimson Fury] becomes [Undying Fury]. When Sian has 1 or fewer HP, he becomes [Immortal] for 2s.
The [Oath of Victory] effect is granted to the entire team at the start of the stage. Increases Dark Overload effect by 20%.
The [Crimson Sword Dance] effect is enhanced. When Black Flash, Rush, Full Moon, or Bloodstorm hit they activate the [Guardian's Resolve] effect.
For every Dark ally in the party, Dark team members' Defense Penetration increases by 3%.

[Scarlet Domination and Undying Fury] effects are enhanced. [Flawless Swordsmanship] Gauge charge rate increases by 100%. When Black Flash, Rush, Full Moon, or Bloodstorm hit they restore 20% of the user's Power Gauge and decrease Knight's Pride cooldown by 3s. When Knight's Pride hits it grants [Zenith Sword] to Dark team members.
